title: Used MF 35mm f/1.2 Mark II APS-C lens for Z/EOS-M
body_html:
Blending a compact form factor with a bright optical design, the 35mm f/1.2 Mark II Lens from 7Artisans is a classic prime well-suited for every day, available light photography. This stylish black portrait-length prime is designed for APS-C-format mirrorless cameras and offers a 52.5mm equivalent focal length, and the fast f/1.2 maximum aperture suits working in low-light conditions and offers increased control over depth of field for working with selective focus techniques. The manual focus design permits working with subjects as close as 11' away, and its rounded 10-blade diaphragm contributes to a pleasing bokeh quality, an ideal combination for portraiture.

Featuring a newly redesigned optical formula for increased sharpness, the lens optics are complemented by a multi-layer coating, which serves to minimize surface reflections, flare, and ghosting for greater contrast and color accuracy in various lighting conditions.

  • Compact portrait-length prime is designed for APS-C-format mirrorless cameras and offers a 52.5mm equivalent focal length.
  • Exceptionally fast f/1.2 maximum aperture benefits working with shallow depth of field and selective focus techniques and photographing in low-light conditions.
  • Multi-layer coating has been applied to individual elements and reduces flare and ghosting for greater contrast and color accuracy.
  • Rounded 10-blade diaphragm contributes to a pleasing bokeh quality.
  • Manual focus design with minimum focus distance of 11".
  • Depth of field and distance scales aid pre-focusing and zone focusing techniques.

title: MF 35mm T1.05 APS-C MF Cine Lens for E/FX/M43/EOS-R/L
body_html:
Sharp, small, robust, and incredibly fast, this 25/35/50mm T1.05 Vision Cine Lens from 7artisans is built for the cinema industry and works with standard cine lens accessories, so it will easily fit into your workflow. The maximum T1.05 aperture allows you to film a gentle soft bokeh with soft natural-looking out-of-focus highlights, while the T16 minimum aperture helps reduce artifacts that can appear when the aperture opening is too small.

The 270° focus throw allows you to make extremely accurate focus pulls, and the lens features cine-standard 0.8 MOD lens gears for focus and iris. A 90mm front diameter allows you to use a variety of industry-standard matte boxes, and the 82mm front filter thread allows you to mount optional filters directly on the front of the lens.

Note:
Please note that this lens is designed only for use with mirrorless cameras and should not be used with SLRs or DSLRs.
The Vision series of lenses is highly versatile and available in Canon RF, Sony E, FUJIFILM X, Leica L, and MFT mounts.
ED glass and an all-metal shell provide a pleasing image and a durable lens.
Lenses in the 7artisans Vision cine lens series share common focus and iris gear ring positions, which speeds up lens changes as accessories such as follow focus units or iris motors don't have to be repositioned.
Focus markings and measurements are in feet and meters.
The iris ring has no click stops, allowing you to make smooth iris pulls.
A minimum focusing distance of about 14" allows you to get up close to your subject.

title: MF 4mm f/2.8 lens for E/FX/M43
body_html: Featuring a one-of-a-kind 225° field of view, 7artisans 4mm f/2.8 fisheye lens can create a circular fisheye perspective on Micro Four Thirds (M43) & APS-C cameras. Photographers can create a 360° full panorama image with a minimum of 2-3 shots. The lens weight only 7.09 oz (201g) which makes it extremely portable and allows photographers to have creative shots anywhere, anytime. The lens can also be mounted on DJI Inspire X5 cameras for creating a unique perspective you have never seen before.

title: PVEXTREME PV-S1 Protable LED Light
body_html:
• 【POWER BANK FUNCTION】: There is a built-in 1200mAh rechargeable Lithium battery in the camp light, Which can not only serve in illuminating but also charge your digital device for emergency purposes when you outside camping. (Included USB)
  • 【ADUST THE BRIGHTNESS】: Press one time to turn on the light to bright mode. Press twice to three times turn to soft lighting. Press the key four times to switch to- Blue light flashing.
  • 【WIRELESS & PORTABLE】: About 104g/0.22lbs weight.it is easy to carry when you're camping outside or hiking.
  • 【ONE-BUTTON ACTIVATE SOS AlARM LIGHT】: Open the Alarm Switch, the sensor will detect the moving objects in 5 meters range. Anyone moving near to the Light will trigger the alarm and it will make an alarm sound with a warning lighting, which can warn the bad guys away and seek assistance when in trouble.
  • 【EASY INSTALLATION & WIDE APPLICATION】: The light bar comes with built-in magnet allows you to stick this cordless light to any metal surface, or use the included two metal circular discs with adhesive backing to stick to any cabinet, a closet, under the counter, vanity, hallway, stairs, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, drawer, home bar, safe box, and dorm.（With hanging rope, rope lanyard can be hung outdoors in tents, branches, etc.）
 
Note: Products with electrical plugs are designed for use in the US. Outlets and voltage differ internationally and this product may require an adapter or converter for use in your destination. Please check compatibility before purchasing.
 
Model: PV-S1output: 5V/1A
Light source: SMD LED
Weight: 104g
Alarm Sense Distance: s5m/10m
Product Size: L140*W26.5*H37mm
Charging input: DC SV/1A
Battery: Li-ion Battery 3.7V 2000mA
Lamp Power: 0.5w /1w /1.5w
Alarm Sense Mode: Radar Sensor
Light Temperature: 6000K -6500K (Cool White)


Function Introduction

1. Micro USB Charge Port. Input: DCSV 1A.

2.Battery Low Voltage Indicator Light. The red light will flash if the battery voltage is too low.

3.USB Output: DC5V 1A. Charger for Mobile phone or other electronics products.

4.Power Magnet: It could be fixed on any iron surfaces (Except the stainless steel surface).

5. Charging Indicator Light: The blue light flashes when charging. It will become normal lighting when the light is fully charged.

6.Power Button: Press one time to turn on the light to bright mode. Press twice to three times turn to soft lighting. Press the key four times to switch to- Blue light flashing.

7 Alarm Switch: Turn the Alarm switch to ON position will turn on the alarm. The sensor will detect the moving objects in 5 meters range. Anyone moving near to the Light will trigger the alarm and it will make an alarm sound with a warning lighting. The alarm sound and warning lighting will last for 15s if there's no new trigger. If the Alarm detects moving objects in 5 meters range, the alarm will ring continuously with the warning lighting.

Repetitive corrections of spherical and chromatic aberration lead to very well controlled ligh spots shape, and good contrast and sharpness in focus area of this large aperture lens.

title: 1/4 WHITE SOFT FILTER (46mm-82mm)
body_html:
SOFT DIFFUSION FILTER
CREATES GLOW EFFECT
SOFTENS SKIN AND BLEMISHES
CREATE A DREAM-LIKE ATMOSPHERE

7artisans Soft diffuses and softens strong light entering the lens and produces a diffused glowing effect. While the resulting image appears softer and ethereal with little loss of clarity or detail. This filter works by diffusing the light entering the lens with small particles; by spreading the light more evenly, a soft glow is created rather than the sharp, well-defined image when shooting without a filter.

The Soft effect of this filter makes it widely used in portrait photography, which can cover up blemishes on the face or skin. For Landscape Photography, using the Soft filter can ad glowing effects to strong light.

7artisans 25mm F0.95 APS-C wide-angle lens with a large aperture, named "Firefly" series with the recently released 50mm F0.95 and 35mm F0.95, a super-large aperture as its main feature.

This is a APS-C lens suitable for shooting small scenery and environmental portrait content. The supported mount is E/Z/FX/M43/EOSM.

The picture quality is excellent, and the large aperture also has excellent resolution.

The 25mm F0.95 APS-C lens adopts an optical structure of 11 elements in 9 groups, all use HOYA lenses, including three HOYA ultra-low dispersion lenses to suppress spherical aberration that negatively affects resolution performance. This improves the image quality of shooting with a large aperture and improves the resolution of the lens.

25mm focal length, small wide angle which can accommodate more details.

Different from the commonly used 35/50 focal length, the new 7artisans 25mm a small wide-angle and large-aperture model that is rarely seen in the market for APS-C lenses. As a wide-angle lens, it can accommodate more landscapes and details when shooting. It is especially suitable for travel photography, and it can better integrate with the landscape when shooting portraits. The sharp image and soft blur effect can make it an excellent choice for a variety of scenes from landscape portraits to still lifes.

F0.95 large aperture, enjoy beautiful blur

The large aperture of F0.95 has great advantages for shooting in low light conditions, and the larger amount of light can make the viewfinder brighter, making it easier for the photographer to observe the subject. And compared to the same focal length small aperture lens can have a faster shutter, lower ISO, better night scene performance.

The shallow depth of field created by F0.95 can achieve great effect . The picture is more transparent, the colors are more vivid.

The lens adopts the design of 13 aperture
blades, the out-of-focus imaging transition is
natural, and the overall picture is rich in color.

And in a shooting environment with a little light source, beautiful circular spots can be shot to add a sense of atmosphere to the picture.

The closest focus is 0.25m, experience the fun of macro photography.

The closest focusing distance of 0.25m and the F0.95 super-large aperture can easily shoot still life images with beautiful blur effects, and experience the fun of macro photography.

All-metal design, wear-resistant and corrosion-resistant.
The mechanical structure of the lens is made of metal, and the new casing oxidation process makes it more wear-resistant, oil-resistant, and corrosion-resistant, and it is not easy to absorb dust, making cleaning difficult.

At the same time, the bayonet part is upgraded to be more robust and durable, and the color and texture of the electroplated tungsten steel is better.

title: MF 50mm f/0.95 APS-C lens for E/EOS-R/FX/M43/Z
body_html:
Distinguished by its bright design, the 7artisans Photoelectric 50mm f/0.95 Lens is a portrait-length prime for Micro Four Thirds cameras. Its impressively fast maximum aperture offers a wealth of control over depth of field and also benefits working in dark and low-light conditions. The clickless aperture design provides smooth and seamless aperture control. In addition to the large aperture, the lens uses a variety of specialized elements and ultra-low dispersion, high-quality glass in order to achieve sharp imagery with accurate colors. The lens's manual focus design permits working with subjects as close as 1.5' away and features a 13-blade diaphragm that contributes to a smooth bokeh quality.

  • Prime lens well-suited to everyday shooting with subjects including portraiture, street, landscape, and reportage
  • Exceedingly fast f/0.95 maximum aperture suits working in low-light conditions and also offers great control over depth of field for isolating subject matter using selective focus techniques
  • Manual focus design permits smooth and refined control with a minimum focusing distance of 1.5'
  • Clickless aperture ring offers smooth, silent rotation throughout the aperture range, making it ideal for video applications
  • A 13-blade diaphragm contributes to a smooth and pleasing bokeh quality

title: MF 10mm f/2.8 Full-frame fisheye lens for E/L/R/Z/GFX( Medium Format )
body_html: 7Artisans 10mm f2.8 Full frame fish-eye lens made of 8 groups of 11 optical structures with one HOYA ultra-low dispersion glass to reduce chromatic aberrations, the 178 degree large viewing angle is suitable for landscape/VR panorama production star/travel/underwater photography, etc., The closest focus distance is 0.17 meters, allowing you to experience the fun of shooting close. With the maximum F/2.8 aperture, you will be able to shoot under low light condition and indoors without a flash or supplemental lighting.

title: MF 60mm f/2.8 Mark II APS-C lens for E/EOS-R/FX/M43/Z/L
body_html:
1. High-performance, high image quality 1x macro telephoto lens
  2. The first lens in its class to feature inner focusing. The lens length never changes, even at life-size.
  3. Bright f/2.8 Aperture: With a large, bright maximum aperture of f/2.8 you can let in a lot of light, as well as create a beautiful shallow depth of field effects.
  4. Compact, Lightweight Design: The 7artisans 60mm f/2.8 Marco lens features a tapered design that allows you to get incredibly close to even small subjects, allowing you to fill the frame with beautiful, life-sized details. Its compact and lightweight body makes it easy to bring for shots on the go and made possible thanks to clever construction that helps to reduce the lens’ overall size and weight.
  5. Circular Aperture (9 Blades): Thanks to its 9-blade, circular aperture, the 60mm f/2.8 Macro lens is capable of creating gorgeous, evocative out-of-focus areas and soft backgrounds. By delivering an incredible level of control over background blur, it helps you create intimacy and intensity in your photos and videos for impactful results.

Note: Our lens is only suitable for mirrorless cameras, not suitable for SLR cameras

MF 35mm f/1.2 Mark II APS-C lens for E/FX/M43/Z
body_html:
Blending a compact form factor with a bright optical design, the 35mm f/1.2 Mark II Lens from 7Artisans is a classic prime well-suited for every day, available light photography. This stylish black portrait-length prime is designed for APS-C-format mirrorless cameras and offers a 52.5mm equivalent focal length, and the fast f/1.2 maximum aperture suits working in low-light conditions and offers increased control over depth of field for working with selective focus techniques. The manual focus design permits working with subjects as close as 11' away, and its rounded 10-blade diaphragm contributes to a pleasing bokeh quality, an ideal combination for portraiture.

Featuring a newly redesigned optical formula for increased sharpness, the lens optics are complemented by a multi-layer coating, which serves to minimize surface reflections, flare, and ghosting for greater contrast and color accuracy in various lighting conditions.

  • Compact portrait-length prime is designed for APS-C-format mirrorless cameras and offers a 52.5mm equivalent focal length.
  • Exceptionally fast f/1.2 maximum aperture benefits working with shallow depth of field and selective focus techniques and photographing in low-light conditions.
  • Multi-layer coating has been applied to individual elements and reduces flare and ghosting for greater contrast and color accuracy.
  • Rounded 10-blade diaphragm contributes to a pleasing bokeh quality.
  • Manual focus design with minimum focus distance of 11".
  • Depth of field and distance scales aid pre-focusing and zone focusing techniques.

title: MF 50mm f/1.8 APS-C lens for E/EOS-M/FX/M43
body_html: Combined with APS-C camera this 50mm lens is perfect for making portraits.
